description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image, defining a PIP_CACHE_DIR variable and caching both .cache/pip and the venv/ directory. Include a before_script that prints the Python version, installs virtualenv, creates and activates a virtualenv, installs the current package, and creates a public directory. Define two stages, test and quality and deploy. In the test and quality stage add a pylint job that runs pip install pylint pylint-exit anybadge, runs pylint on pytemplate/ and tests/*.py piping output to pylint.txt, extracts the rating with sed, echoes the score, generates a badge with anybadge, and stores public/pylint.svg as an artifact; also add a test job that runs python setup.py test. In the deploy stage add a wheel job that runs python setup.py bdist_wheel and publishes dist/*.whl as an artifact, and a pages job that runs pip install sphinx sphinx-rtd-theme recommonmark, builds the docs with make html in the doc directory, copies the generated HTML to the public folder, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
